case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. CHRISTEN N BERTSCH

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 17030066) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 08/31/2016 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D302)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. Motion To Vacate Judgment Entered On 08/31/2016 is Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.'s motion to vacate judgment is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.
